message: 🌱 Add kepler: Provide go vet and gosec in Github action mission (#454)

+    "description": "Provide go vet and gosec in Github action. This issue affects 0+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kepler feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kepler deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=kepler\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kepler -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: Provide go vet and gosec in Github action"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current resource configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kepler resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get resource -A\nkubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>\n```\n**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**\nUse go vet and gosec to ensure the code is following the best practice with security check"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Provide go vet and gosec in Github action",
+        "description": "cc: @rootfs @SamYuan1990\n```yaml\n$ golangci-lint run --out-format json | jq '.Issues | length'\r\n50\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Provide go vet and gosec in Github action is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kepler -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This issue was resolved by applying the fix from the linked PR. The root cause was identified and addressed by the community.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ golangci-lint run --out-format json | jq '.Issues | length'\r\n50"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
